mapper.update: UPDATE video_comment SET reply_count = CASE WHEN reply_count > 0 THEN reply_count - 1 ELSE 0 END WHERE id = #{parentId}
mapper.select: SELECT u.username AS user, c.create_time AS createTime, m.name AS movie, c.content AS content, u.head_url AS avatar FROM video_comment c LEFT JOIN sys_movie m ON m.id = c.video_id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = c.user_id WHERE c.is_deleted = 0 AND c.status = 1 ORDER BY c.create_time DESC LIMIT 4
